title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: Justin Sun Sues Trump-Backed World Liberty Financial Over Frozen Tokens
summary: The Tron founder says World Liberty froze his tokens, stripped his voting rights, and threatened to burn his holdings. Now he's suing.

title: Justin Sun sues World Liberty Financial over token lockup
summary: Sun said the suit is to protect his rights as a token holder, but he remains a supporter of President Donald Trump and his administration’s efforts to make the US crypto-friendly.

title: Anthropic's Claude Mythos AI Finds 271 Vulnerabilities in Firefox—Yes, It's Seriously Powerful
summary: Anthropic’s powerful Claude Mythos AI model found hundreds of vulnerabilities in Mozilla Firefox, highlighting its cybersecurity potential.

title: Unauthorized group has gained access to Anthropic’s exclusive cyber tool Mythos, report claims
summary: Anthropic told TechCrunch it is investigating the claims, but maintains that there is no evidence that its systems have been impacted.

title: SpaceX is working with Cursor and has an option to buy the startup for $60B
summary: The move could shore up weaknesses at each company, but it also reveals them. Neither Cursor nor xAI has proprietary models that can match the leading offerings from Anthropic and OpenAI — the same companies now competing directly with Cursor for the developer market.

title: Revolut Targeting $200 Billion Valuation in IPO—But Not Until 2028: FT
summary: Global fintech firm Revolut is eying a $200 billion IPO, according to a report—but don't expect the move any time soon.

title: ChatGPT’s new Images 2.0 model is surprisingly good at generating text
summary: ChatGPT Images 2.0, the newest image-generation model from OpenAI, shows just how much AI capabilities have evolved over the last few years.

title: Sam Altman throws shade at Anthropic’s cyber model, Mythos: ‘fear-based marketing’
summary: This week, during a podcast appearance, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman called out his competitor's new cybersecurity model, noting that the company was using fear to make its product sound more impressive than it actually is.

title: Amazon Will Invest Up to $25 Billion More in Anthropic as AI Demand Surges
summary: Amazon secures Anthropic as a major cloud customer through 2036 in one of the largest AI infrastructure alliances to date.

title: Revolut eyes valuation of up to $200B in eventual IPO
summary: Fintech giant Revolut, which secured a full banking license in the U.K. in March after years of waiting, was most recently valued at $75 billion in a secondary share sale.
